$schema_note: Third-party binary blobs for the NanoPi Zero2, pinned per GoSD's no-rehosting policy: fetched from upstream at build time by URL + sha256, never re-hosted in our releases.

rkbin.license_note: Rockchip's rkbin LICENSE (at the pinned commit, repo root) grants a non-exclusive license to use, copy, and distribute the software, and to modify/sublicense modifications. This permits idbloader.img and u-boot.itb -- which necessarily embed these blobs -- to be produced and distributed by GoSD. Same commit already pinned for the Radxa Zero 3E (build/boards/radxa-zero-3e/manifest.json); it also carries the RK3528 blobs this board needs.

ddr_tpl.purpose: DDR-init TPL (ROCKCHIP_TPL) for RK3528, per bean gosd-vcae's research and U-Boot's doc/board/rockchip/rockchip.rst rk3528 build recipe.

bl31.purpose: ARM Trusted Firmware BL31 (EL3 runtime firmware) for RK3528, per bean gosd-vcae's research.
